items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Control implementation mapping with status lifecycle', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The prior steps do not mention any data or API reads that confirm the existence or functionality of control implementation mapping, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence of this mapping being implemented or validated, the requirement cannot be deemed satisfied.
